channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Small plane makes emergency landing on busy intersection in Georgia
item.description: The plane hit three vehicles, but remarkably no one was severely hurt during the incident.

item.title: Airlines adjust as Trump's policies dry up Cuba's jet fuel supplies
item.description: A Canadian airline suspends flights to Cuba as U.S sanctions and Trump's tariff threats force Havana to warn carriers there's no way to refuel on the ...

item.title: WATCH: The real people behind Bad Bunny’s big performance
item.description: Bad Bunny incorporated real-life figures and cultural heroes into his Super Bowl performance, celebrating Puerto Rican and Latin American influence in...

item.title: WATCH: Seahawks meet a mouse at Disneyland
item.description: Fresh off their Super Bowl win, a couple of players from the Seahawks take part in a 40-year-old tradition at Disneyland.

item.title: Ben Ogden becomes 1st U.S. man in 50 years to medal in cross-country
item.description: Ben Ogden of Team USA won the silver medal in the cross-country sprint Tuesday at the Winter Olympics in Italy.

item.title: WATCH: California surfer swept out to sea survives by clinging to lobster trap buoy
item.description: A rescue team swam out and brought him back to shore after he was spotted by drone a quarter of a mile off shore.

item.title: 'Democrats are on offense': House Dems' campaign arm adds 5 seats to target list
item.description: The DCCC said its targeting seats in Minnesota, Colorado and elsewhere.

item.title: Trump’s immigration chiefs are set to testify in Congress following protester deaths
item.description: The heads of agencies enforcing President Donald Trump’s immigration agenda are set to testify before Congress.

item.title: How Americans’ optimism about their future has changed, according to new polling
Judge rejects Trump administration's effort to obtain Michigan voter data
item.description: The Trump administration has filed lawsuits against 24 states in an effort to obtain their voter rolls.

item.title: ‘We hold these truths': Viewing the Declaration of Independence, visitors reflect on America at 250
See the Olympic medal count for the 2026 Winter Games
item.description: Here is a look at where the medal count stands for Team USA and other nations as the competition heats up at the 2026 Winter Olympics.

item.title: How much gold is in an Olympic gold medal, and how much is it worth?
item.description: Olympic medals have what's known as a "melt value." But they're worth far more financially than their mineral contents, an auction expert notes.
